title: 信息日报 2026-07-06

headline.title: sqlite-utils 4.0rc2 发布：大部分代码由 Claude Fable 编写，成本仅 149.25 美元
headline.summary: 开发者 Simon Willison 借助 Anthropic 的 Claude Fable 模型完成了 sqlite-utils 4.0rc2 的大部分代码，总成本约 149.25 美元。这是 AI 辅助编程实用化的又一例证，展示了高级语言模型在复杂工具开发中的潜力。
headline.title_en: sqlite-utils 4.0rc2, mostly written by Claude Fable (for about $149.25)
headline.summary_en: Developer Simon Willison used Anthropic's Claude Fable model to write most of the sqlite-utils 4.0rc2 release, costing about $149.25. This demonstrates the practical potential of AI-assisted programming for complex tool development.
headline.original_title: sqlite-utils 4.0rc2, mostly written by Claude Fable (for about $149.25)
headline.reason: 该新闻以具体案例展示了 AI 辅助编程的成本效益和实用性，得分最高（14.1），且关联 AI、开源、开发等多个版面。
headline.reason_en: This story concretely demonstrates the cost-effectiveness and practicality of AI-assisted programming, has the highest score (14.1), and intersects AI, open source, and development sections.
